name: Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch x 5-inch x 3-inch loaf pan.
2. Combine flour and baking powder in a large bowl.
3. Add salt, honey, and beer to the flour mixture.
4. Stir until well mixed and spread batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until browned and a wooden pick inserted comes out clean.
6. Turn bread onto a rack and cool before slicing.
